channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: New England Patriots Owner ‘Tried to Kill’ Story of Head Coach Mike Vrabel’s Alleged Affair With Dianna Russini (Exclusive) - Yahoo Sports
item.description:
1. New England Patriots Owner ‘Tried to Kill’ Story of Head Coach Mike Vrabel’s Alleged Affair With Dianna Russini (Exclusive)  Yahoo Sports
  2. Inside the fallout of the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel photos  ESPN
  3. Report: Patriots tried to stop New York Post from publishing the Mike Vrabel-Dianna Russini photos  Yahoo Sports
  4. NFL not investigating Patriots coach Mike Vrabel's behavior with reporter Dianna Russini  CBS News
  5. Patriots analyst Scott Zolak has nothing to say about Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini  NBC Sports

item.title: The deadline to register to vote is tonight - here's everything you need to know - BBC
item.description:
1. The deadline to register to vote is tonight - here's everything you need to know  BBC
  2. How to register to vote in local elections with deadline just hours away  The Independent
  3. Deadline this week to apply for postal vote in Holyrood election  Border Telegraph
  4. Hours left to register to vote before deadline  Wired-gov.net
  5. Residents urged to register to vote before deadline tonight  Midlothian View
